entities.name: NITRIFICATION INHIBITORS
entities.description: Compounds used to retard the process of nitrification in soil

entities.name: NITRIFICATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting ammonium nitrogen into nitrates

entities.name: PERCENT INHIBITION OF NITRIFICATION
entities.description: A criterion for comparing the effectiveness of nitrification inhibitors when soil samples do not contain significant amounts of ammonium nitrogen

entities.name: NITRIFICATION RATES
entities.description: A criterion for comparing the ability of compounds to retard nitrification when soil samples contain significant amounts of ammonium nitrogen

entities.name: AMMONIUM NITROGEN
entities.description: The form of nitrogen in soil that is converted during the nitrification process

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The medium in which nitrification occurs and inhibitors are tested
